destinations.evidence: The LLM codec decodes the full 30-field ABI and preserves field 29 as a StorageRef while exposing executor, TTL, messages, and model.
Validation consumes the full codec result and still checks executor, TTL, model, and messages.

equivalence_argument: The port rejects truncated or partial LLM payloads by requiring exactly 30 decoded tokens, then validates the same base fields and message/model constraints from that full decode.
notes: This covers both the codec and validation-facing field access.
rationale: The primary diff expands `LLMCallRequest::from_abi` from a minimal 7-field decoder to a 30-field decoder, adds `convo_history: StorageRef`, decodes it from token index 29, and adds a validation roundtrip test for `convo_history.platform`, `path`, and `key_ref`. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: LLM precompile request decoding must use the full 30-field ABI and preserve field 29 `convo_history` as a `StorageRef`, while still exposing the executor, TTL, secret fields, `messages_json`, and `model` needed for validation.
suggested_falsification_tests: ABI-encode an LLM request with valid base fields, non-empty messages/model, and a `convo_history` StorageRef. Assert `validate_async_payload` accepts it and `LLMCallRequest::from_abi` returns the exact platform/path/key_ref. Also assert payloads with missing/truncated fields fail decoding instead of being accepted as a partial 7-field request.
summary: LLM payload decoding preserves conversation history StorageRef.
test_or_falsification_candidate: ABI-encode a full LLM request with a non-default field-29 StorageRef and valid model/messages; assert validation accepts it and LLMCallRequest::from_abi returns the same StorageRef, while truncated payloads fail.
title: LLM payload decodes conversation history
